message:
fix(codegen): Use module system for cross-project imports

- Change compileZigSharedLib to set CWD to metal0 directory and use
  absolute paths for output files
- When root module is already imported (e.g., numpy), use nested dot
  access (numpy._core.numerictypes) instead of registering a separate
  submodule (@"numpy__core_numerictypes")
- This fixes Zig's "file exists in multiple modules" error when
  submodules share files with their parent module
- Make writePackageModuleEntry public for use by from_imports.zig
